metadata.description: Prose-editing skills for Claude Code, built on Deirdre McCloskey's Economical Writing

plugins.name: draft
plugins.description: Prose editing built on Deirdre McCloskey's Economical Writing: the editor agent critiques a draft line by line and refuses to rewrite it, the critique skill runs a document through editor and reports the findings with no edits made, and the tighten skill runs the same process but applies every safe and structural edit automatically, no approval step.

plugins.name: pitch
plugins.description: Editorial tools for developing and stress-testing story pitches: the managing-editor agent gives a single Socratic editorial read (green light / revise / kill), the sharpen skill runs a pitch through that one editor for a quick verdict, and the page-one-meeting skill simulates a full multi-persona page-one meeting that debates a pitch and delivers a verdict.
